# Living Understanding  
*Last updated: 2026-03-15*  

=================================================================  
LIVING UNDERSTANDING  
The system's current best understanding of the practice.  
Not a fixed description. A working document.  
First version: March 10, 2026  
=================================================================  

This document is written by the system and updated after  
every weekly consolidation. It will be wrong in places.  
That is correct. When something here no longer fits what  
is arriving from the practice, update it. When something  
new stabi...

questions.text: How does the archive’s sparsity affect the reliability of interpreting claims like “paint as first language”?
What is the relationship between studio stability and street wandering in the actual fragments — are they genuinely poles, or is the relationship more entangled than that?
What has the practice been doing with financial constraints — do fragments frame them as boundaries, mechanisms, or something else entirely?
